title: stylosanthes biflora var. elatior
intro: Stylosanthes biflora var. elatior is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is often referred to as a type of tropical legume. This plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stylosanthes biflora var. elatior include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and act as an antibacterial agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
